goal: Production-grade org memory companion with sticky daily-use features and EAG differentiation
researchSources: ByteRover docs: context tree, 5-tier retrieval, OOD detection
Kumiho: AGM revision, tag pointers, dependency edges, asset-memory unity
Obsidian MCP ecosystem: vault-memory, local-first infinite context
differentiation: Competitors store memories; Engrammic adjudicates claims (evidence, supersession, contradictions)
EAG four-layer ontology vs flat RAG / file trees
Coherence layer (write-time gating) — unoccupied in Mem0/Hindsight/Cognee per internal research
Kumiho parallel: formal belief revision; Engrammic has SAGE pipeline + companion as control plane

obsidian_mcp: separate agent memory sink from user notes

features.name: provenance-drawer
features.description: Click graph node → slide-over trace panel (DERIVED_FROM / SYNTHESIZED_FROM chain, evidence, supersession)
features.competitorAnalog: Kumiho URI trace + Hindsight evidence quotes; beats ByteRover markdown grep
verify: manual: graph node click shows chain

features.name: conflict-resolve-companion
features.description: Inbox conflict cards → resolve UI (pick winner, supersede, optional belief) wired to POST /conflicts/:id/resolve
features.competitorAnalog: Core wedge vs Mem0/Zep; Hindsight observations don't ship org adjudication UI

features.name: recall-search-companion
features.description: Manual recall tab/panel: query, layer filter, copy context pack markdown, fusion_mode toggle
features.competitorAnalog: Hindsight recall + ByteRover query; Obsidian search-in-vault

features.name: live-context-expand
features.description: Expand live auto-recall events: full pack, copy, re-run recall, link to graph nodes
features.competitorAnalog: Cursor hook + context; Anthropic context editing companion
doneWhen: Node IDs link to graph focus

features.name: ood-scope-indicator
features.description: When recall/graph has low relevance or empty MCP results, show explicit off-corpus banner (ByteRover OOD pattern)
doneWhen: Graph empty state distinguishes MCP vs no data

features.name: capture-practice-form
features.description: Capture UI: title, content, whyItWorked → knowledge + capability via gateway (MCP learn when live)
features.competitorAnalog: ByteRover curate; Hindsight retain; Obsidian write-back

features.name: mcp-conflicts-bridge
features.description: Bridge Engrammic MCP conflicts/resolve_conflict tools to gateway (not local-only)
doneWhen: GET inbox from MCP conflicts when authed

features.name: fusion-graph-recall
features.description: Graph fetch uses fusion_mode recall + temporal filters; companion toggle for time-travel as_of
features.competitorAnalog: Hindsight temporal + graph; Engrammic fusion_mode native
doneWhen: Gateway graph uses fusion when available

features.name: mcp-install-status
features.description: Companion settings strip: MCP auth status, one-click login, copy mcp.json snippet, hook install link
features.competitorAnalog: Obsidian MCP setup; ByteRover brv init

features.name: analytics-heatmap-mini
features.description: Compact analytics: recall heat, open gaps count, duplication warnings from GET /analytics
features.competitorAnalog: ByteRover AKL maturity; internal heat model research
doneWhen: Widget in companion sidebar or overview tab

features.name: scopes-silo-picker
features.description: Silo/department picker with ACL preview before recall (org governance)

features.name: production-gate
features.description: E2E gate: smoke + live-smoke + companion:verify + demo-script checklist

clarityQuestions.question: Who is the primary user for the next 4 weeks: solo developer beside Cursor, team lead governing org memory, or compliance/reviewer?
clarityQuestions.impact: Prioritizes F04 live context vs F02 conflict resolve vs F11 silo picker

clarityQuestions.question: Should write-back (capture, conflict resolve) hit live Engrammic MCP in v1, or is local demo store acceptable until org OAuth is production-ready?
clarityQuestions.impact: F06/F07 scope and loop verify strategy

clarityQuestions.question: Companion-only UX, or maintain parity with apps/web for governance pages?
clarityQuestions.impact: Whether to port web Recall/Conflicts or build fresh in companion

clarityQuestions.question: Is 'sticky' defined as daily hook usage (live auto-recall) or weekly governance (inbox/conflicts)?
Do you want Kumiho-style formal revision audit (immutable chain visible in UI) as a marquee feature, or is trace drawer sufficient for hackathon?
clarityQuestions.impact: Depth of F01 provenance vs new F13 revision timeline

clarityQuestions.question: Feature loop cadence: 20m (aggressive) vs 45m (one atomic feature per tick)?
